description: Water, preserved water, acidified water or another vehicle presented for laboratory, pharmaceutical or parenteral-risk use.
mandatory_evidence: Exact composition and concentration of every ingredient
pH, osmolality, conductivity and appearance specifications
Preservative identity and assay where applicable
Sterility and bacterial-endotoxin evidence for sterile claims
Bioburden and objectionable-organism controls where non-sterile
Compatibility statement limited to directly studied products
Manufacturer, site, batch and supply-chain evidence
automatic_rejection: Sterile claim supported only by a generic certificate
